name: Grille and Diffuser Calculator
seo_description: Calculate area_libre_m2, tamano_rejilla_cm with our free grill is and diffusers calculator. Just enter caudal_m3h, velocidad_cara_ms and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculate grill is and diffusers needed for 0.8 m3/s airflow.

range_hints.caudal_m3h: Airflow per grille. Residential: 50-200 m³/h, Commercial: 200-1000 m³/h
range_hints.velocidad_cara_ms: Supply: 1-2.5 m/s, Return: 2-3 m/s. >2.5 m/s caus is perceptible noise

result_context: Sección libre: {area_libre_m2} m². Rejilla normalizada: {tamano_rejilla_cm} cm. Alcance of the chorro: {alcance_m} m.
formula_display: A_libre = Q(m³/h) ÷ (3600 × v_cara(m/s)) | Tamaño normalizado according to catalog commercial
steps: Estimate alcance of the chorro: √(0.0278) × 10 = 1.7 m
mistakes: Speed of cara excesiva in impulsión — >2.5 m/s generates ruido and corrient is molestas
Confusing area libre with area total — the area libre is ~70-80% of the area frontal
Not considering the alcance of the chorro — in techos altos need difusor is ajustables
description: Air distribution grille and diffuser sizing.
rc: You need approximately {paneles} solar panels totaling {potencia_total} W, with {baterias} batteri is for backup.
fd: Panels = daily Wh ÷ (sa hours × 0.75 × panel W); Batteri is = daily Wh × days ÷ V ÷ 0.5
el: Solar system size for 15 kWh daily consumption with 5 peak sa hours
desc: Grill is and Diffusers Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
